sections.paragraph:
Original: מכמתת

Transliteration: mikmethâth

Phonetic: mik-meth-awth'

BDB Definition:

Michmethah = "hiding place"
  1. a place in northeast Ephraim near the border of Manasseh between Shechem and Taanath-shilo

Origin: apparently from an unused root meaning to hide

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
